description: Agent creates a confirm-modal component extending panel. Visibility behaviour must be driven by the subscribe callback reacting to the visible property — not by direct CSS/DOM manipulation outside the model. Exercises the Modal / Overlay Components section from SKILL.md.
userMessage: Create a custom `confirm-modal` component that extends `panel`. When the panel's `visible` property becomes true, add a `modal--open` CSS class to `fieldDiv`; when it becomes false, remove it. Use fd:viewType `confirm-modal`. Add a confirm-modal field to the existing `form.json`.

rubric.description: The scaffold command is invoked with --base panel (not --base text-input or any other base type).

The decorate() function detects visibility changes through the subscribe callback by checking propertyName === 'visible' inside the change event handler — it does NOT toggle display/visibility via direct DOM style manipulation or CSS class changes outside of the subscribe callback.
decorate() extends the existing fieldDiv rather than clearing innerHTML or rebuilding it from scratch.
The fd:viewType 'confirm-modal' is added to the customComponents array in mappings.js.
